rationale: Section 11.135 references the exemption under Section 11.13 generally without hardcoding any dollar amount. The increased exemption amount would automatically flow through to calculations under Subsection (c). No statutory amendment to this section is required.
quote: the owner may continue to receive the exemption for the structure and the land and improvements used in the residential occupancy of the structure
_note: No dollar amount appears in §11.135; it references §11.13 by section number only, so the proposed increase flows through automatically. Comptroller forms under Subsection (g) may need administrative updates but no statutory conflict exists.
